name: Mind Flayer

traits.name: Innate Spellcasting (Psionics)
traits.text: [UNSUPPORTED] Innate spellcasting ability is Intelligence (save DC 15). At will: detect thoughts, levitate. 1/day each: dominate monster, plane shift (self only). None are modeled by the engine.

traits.name: Tentacles stun-while-grappled
traits.text: [APPROXIMATED as a short stunned rider] On a Tentacles hit, a Medium or smaller target is grappled (escape DC 15) and must succeed on a DC 15 INT save or be stunned until the grapple ends. Encoded as a 1-round stun rider on a failed save; the grapple itself is not modeled.

traits.name: Extract Brain
traits.text: [UNSUPPORTED] Melee attack vs. an incapacitated humanoid grappled by the flayer: 55 (10d10) piercing damage; if this reduces the target to 0 hp, the flayer kills it by extracting and devouring its brain.

strategy: Lead with Mind Blast to stun a cluster, then exploit stunned foes with Tentacles, relying on Magic Resistance to shrug off enemy casters.
